rationale: Semgrep CLI scans the working tree (reading source files and .semgrepignore) and writes SARIF/JSON reports plus custom rule YAMLs. It fetches rulesets from semgrep.dev and emits telemetry to metrics.semgrep.dev on every invocation per the observed-endpoints note. Installation paths invoke pip/brew/docker (hitting pypi/github), and the agent will spawn the semgrep binary itself for scans, --test, and --validate.
